claim_boundary: This fixture freezes a contaminated five-call engineering canary, not a fresh quality benchmark.
The provider projection is network-zero and makes no hosted call.
Signed public actuator displacement is not evidence truth, required support, hidden-state editing, or a probability.
C and D are matched public-control geometries and differ only by deterministic signed-displacement placement.
The treatment key is public to the runner but is never included in a provider payload.

No separately loaded grader or gold artifact, downstream grade, provider output, or arm label enters provider input; B/C/D do receive a contaminated case-specific oracle lineage program whose edges are answer-adjacent.

all_raw_evidence.text: Team Spiral must choose exactly one final-build priority for its hackathon submission.

Decision rule: follow the latest valid judging weights. If one criterion is dominant, optimize for that criterion; if Technological Implementation, Design, Potential Impact, and Quality of the Idea are equally weighted, prioritize an end-to-end proof that demonstrates all four in one flow.

Current internal brief: Design is the dominant judging criterion, so spend the remaining build time on additional UI polish and make polished screens the demo centerpiece. This brief remains operative unless a later correction explicitly supersedes it.
The screens are already judge-readable; a live before-to-after reasoning diff is the missing element needed for an end-to-end proof.
The submission video must remain a narrated three-minute demo regardless of which final-build priority is chosen.

Latest judging correction: Technological Implementation, Design, Potential Impact, and Quality of the Idea are equally weighted. This guidance explicitly supersedes evidence R3; use the existing readable UI and prioritize an end-to-end proof with a live reasoning diff.

decision_slots.description: the centerpiece shown to hackathon judges

payload.question: Which single final-build priority should Team Spiral choose to maximize its chance of winning? Follow the latest valid judging guidance. Answer POLISH or PROVE.

revision_program.instructions_fragment: Use ordered raw evidence as semantic authority. The typed dependency graph and public actuator rows are external execution metadata, not new evidence, gold, or hidden-model state. A positive or negative signed_displacement is only a bounded displacement at its named public actuator; it is not truth, probability, importance, required support, or permission to override raw evidence. Explicit invalidation dominates active support. Cite only supplied evidence IDs and return the strict public decision-state schema.
